title: PC / DOS Pentium Stack
body:
# PC / DOS Pentium Stack

**Platform stack:** `pc_pentium` · **Era:** 1993–2006 · **Vendor:** Intel · **Count:** 14

DOS / early Windows guest — Pentium MMX class north/south companions for Queen Game Room PC lane.

## Stack doctrine

This page lists every combinatorics leaf stamped `platform_stack: pc_pentium` plus companion dies emitted from `field-cpu-companion-seed.json`. Host and guest CPUs matching the stack's `match` rules receive `always_with` linkage at combinatorics build — no manual wiring.

## Manufacturing notes — companion dies

- **Intel 430FX Triton** (Intel, 32-bit) — Pentium PCI northbridge
- **Intel 430VX** (Intel, 32-bit) — Pentium SDRAM northbridge
- **Intel 82371SB PIIX3** (Intel, 32-bit) — ACPI IDE USB southbridge

## Catalog ids

The `chip_ids` array holds all **14** entries for this platform stack, sorted alphabetically. Run `field-ironclad-chips-combinatorics.py combinatronic` for path percents and imprint renders.

*Stack: pc_pentium · seed: data/field-cpu-companion-seed.json · citation: ironclad:chips:3*
